addon.name: lmd
addon.description: Directive-driven Markdown for agent plans. Reusable macros, phase-isolation and single-sourcing keep plans token-lean and cache-safe — written hard against lean-ctx, inspired by MarkdownAI.
addon.author: dasTholo

addon.name: headroom
addon.description: Reversible context compression for tool outputs, logs, files and RAG chunks — 60–95% fewer tokens, originals retrievable on demand. Installs on add (uv tool install) and wires its MCP server (headroom mcp serve) into the lean-ctx gateway.
addon.author: chopratejas

addon.name: rtk
addon.description: Single-binary CLI proxy that filters and compresses shell command output by 60–90%. Reaches MCP clients through the rtk-mcp bridge, so the lean-ctx gateway can run commands through it.
addon.author: rtk-ai

addon.name: graphify
addon.description: Turns code, docs, schemas and more into one queryable knowledge graph for agents. Ships an MCP server (stdio + HTTP) exposing query_graph, get_node, get_neighbors and shortest_path.
addon.author: safishamsi

addon.name: repomix
addon.description: Packs a whole repository into a single AI-ready file. Its MCP server (npx repomix --mcp) lets agents pack local or remote repos and grep the output on demand.
addon.author: yamadashy

addon.name: serena
addon.description: LSP-backed semantic code retrieval, editing and refactoring — the IDE for your coding agent. Connects over MCP via stdio or Streamable HTTP.
addon.author: oraios

addon.name: claude-context
addon.description: Semantic code search over an entire codebase (hybrid BM25 + dense vectors). Ships an MCP server (@zilliz/claude-context-mcp) so any coding agent can index and query millions of lines.
addon.author: zilliztech

addon.name: mem0
addon.description: Drop-in long-term memory for agents (vector + graph + key-value). Provides an official MCP server so agents can write and recall user/session/agent memories.
addon.author: mem0ai

addon.name: cognee
addon.description: Builds a queryable knowledge graph plus vector store from your data (ECL / GraphRAG pipeline). Ships an MCP server for structured memory, recall and forgetting.
addon.author: topoteretes

addon.name: letta
addon.description: Stateful agent runtime that manages its own memory like an operating system (core + archival tiers). Exposes MCP-compatible tools and a server endpoint.
addon.author: letta-ai

addon.name: sequential-thinking
addon.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning tool — the official MCP reference server for breaking a hard problem into revisable thoughts.
addon.author: modelcontextprotocol

addon.name: everything
addon.description: Official MCP reference server that exercises every protocol feature — install it to verify your lean-ctx gateway can discover and call downstream tools.
addon.author: modelcontextprotocol
